name: claw-migrate
description: Share and deploy OpenClaw configurations from ClawTalent community
author: Han Xueyuan <xueyuan_han@163.com>
changelog: 📝 Updated SKILL.md with clearer token handling documentation
📚 Updated README.md with installation instructions and examples
🔒 Replaced execSync with execFile for safer command execution
🟣 NEW: Share command - share configs to ClawTalent platform
🟠 NEW: Deploy command - deploy configs from ClawTalent
🔍 NEW: Search command - search ClawTalent marketplace
